title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Okobore Town Villagers, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kiku, Unknown person #3 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: Wano Country- Kuri-OKOBORE, THE TOWN OF LEFTOVERS

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Tama, who was sick, is now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mmmmm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I feel better!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can't thank ya enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That was QUICK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's because JYagan grass is an extraordinarily potent specialised herb...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....However, that doesn't mean that the poison has been fully removed from your body.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure you don't drink the river water again, O-TAMA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: G'1AA AAM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's a Warrior's shame, a warrior's shame!!

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: I need water!! The river!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop right there, Tama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All right... I'm done.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only did a little first aid, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, thanks. By the way, you're a huge woman!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Big mom was bigger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just before you got here, there was a Sumo Wrestler Harassing Me... you came at just the right time...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a bit late to introduce myself, but...

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: I* am Kiku.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "I am't?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Not, not, not, not, I can't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: PLEASE TAKE THIS AWAY, MISS owner!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't even pay for the medicine 'A gave me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: much less for this porridge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't need to worry about the money. Eat up!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: I CANNOT!! Especially since you and Kiku...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Probably haven't had a full stomach in ages!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet, on top of saving me, you're offering me your food as well!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I cannot accept it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I will definitely find a way to repay ya for the medicine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: silence!! Do you think I'm just going to say "Oh, I see. Nevermind then." To you saying "No thank you."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After I took the time to prepare and serve this food!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't eat, I'll just pour it out on the road and let it go to waste. Under- stood!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TAMA, JUST ACCEPT HER OFFERING!! O-TSURU isn't the type of person to take no for an answer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Remember between

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How long are you going to sit and stare like that...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Good for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's your birthday today, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, is that so!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's true!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: YUUMMMY!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's so delicious!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 44 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
